# hetzner_boot_vnc (Resource)

Manages the VNC installation boot configuration for a Hetzner dedicated server.

## Example Usage

```terraform
# Activates a VNC installation on next boot.
resource "hetzner_boot_vnc" "example" {
  server_number = 12345
  dist          = "CentOS-Stream-9"
  lang          = "en_US"
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `dist` (String) Distribution for VNC install.
- `lang` (String) Language.
- `server_number` (Number) The server number.

### Optional

- `arch` (Number) Architecture (64 or 32). Defaults to 64.

### Read-Only

- `active` (Boolean) Whether VNC install is currently active.
- `password` (String, Sensitive) Generated password. Only available on activation.
- `server_ip` (String) Server main IPv4 address.
- `server_ipv6_net` (String) Server IPv6 network.
